completed_sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Consolidate & Ship
completed_sprints.notes: 153 tests, structured logging, benchmarks, merged to main

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Docker Architecture (Pi5)
completed_sprints.notes: 204 domains in 8.5 min (9x improvement). Subfinder batch enrichment, local CT database, observability stack. 217 tests.

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 3 — Level 1 Pipeline (3.0-3.5)
completed_sprints.notes: Results API, consent management, Level 1 scanners (Nuclei/WPScan/CMSeek), finding interpreter, message composer, client memory, digital twin, mobile console, deployment hardening. 500 tests. All versions pinned. Smoke test integrated into pipeline command.

milestones.name: Docker smoke test (Sprint 3.5)
milestones.notes: 19 checks: Go binaries, templates, CMSeek, app code, imports. Integrated into heimdall-pipeline.

milestones.name: Export script tests (Sprint 3.5)
milestones.notes: 11 tests: CSV schema, CVR enrichment, contactable field, graceful fallbacks.

milestones.name: Version pinning (Sprint 3.5)
milestones.notes: CMSeek commit 20f9780, Nuclei v3.7.1, httpx v1.9.0, webanalyze v0.4.1, subfinder v2.13.0, dnsx v1.2.3.

milestones.name: Telegram delivery (Sprint 4, Increment 4.1)
milestones.notes: Bot setup, human-in-the-loop approval, message delivery.

milestones.name: Client onboarding — first 5 Vejle businesses (Sprint 4, Increment 4.2)
milestones.notes: Real clients, real scans, real messages. Free first month.

milestones.name: Tailscale remote access (Sprint 4)
milestones.notes: Remote console, Grafana, Dozzle access. Soft dependency.

external_deadlines.name: Startup Denmark (SIRI) application
external_deadlines.notes: Ready for final review and submission.

pipeline_run.notes: Full pipeline operational. CMS detection, CVR enrichment, smoke test passing. Twin runs but Nuclei templates don't match simplified responses (design limitation). WPScan sidecar integration pending verification.

next_actions: Verify current Pi5 run — check twin WPScan sidecar logs
Lawyer meeting — outreach legal questions (week of 2026-03-31)
follow_ups: Threat feed integration: abuse.ch URLhaus + WHOIS domain age (Sprint 4+)
